hero.headline1: Transforming Procurement Through AI and Strategy
hero.headline3: From Category Management to AI-Powered Procurement
hero.subtitle: I build procurement strategies, teams, and technologies that deliver measurable results.
hero.imageAlt: Moritz van Laack speaking at a keynote on stage

about.title:
Shaping the Future,
Not Just Reacting.
about.paragraph1: Strategy, a forward-looking perspective on what matters, and a clear stance. With over 12 years in procurement and supply chain, I lead organizations through the complex challenges of digital transformation.
about.paragraph2: From managing EUR 350M in beverage spend at REWE Group, to leading multi-million euro digital transformation projects at MHP (A Porsche Company) and Accenture Strategy, to serving as interim Head of IT & Professional Services in Procurement for a pharmaceutical sales company with EUR 500M+ spend — I've built deep expertise across the entire Source-to-Pay landscape.
about.paragraph3: As founder of van Laack & partners and co-founder of Sourcera AI, I combine enterprise-grade consulting with cutting-edge AI technology — because the best procurement strategies deserve better tools.
about.paragraph4: With expertise as an entrepreneur, procurement strategist, and AI builder, I stand for authentic sparring that is based on solid values and delivers sustainable results.
about.callout: Let's shape the future of procurement — together.

ventures.title: My Ventures.
ventures.subtitle: Shaping the future of procurement through consulting and AI technology

sourcera.title: Sourcera AI
sourcera.description: The first end-to-end Opportunity-to-Savings (O2S) platform. Sourcera connects ERPs, Spend Cubes, and S2C platforms into one source of truth, using AI to transform fragmented procurement data into optimized tenders and measurable savings.

vanLaack.title: van Laack & partners
vanLaack.description: Procurement transformation and strategy consulting firm specializing in cost-cutting programs, strategic sourcing, and end-to-end supply chain optimization. A team of 20 specialized consultants across Europe serving the world's leading companies — and the hands-on experience that led to founding Sourcera AI.
vanLaack.customers: Serving **Schaeffler, Mercedes-Benz, BASF, Siemens Energy, VW**

timeline.title:
Work × Life ×
High Performance
timeline.subtitle: A career that seamlessly connects <highlight>strategic insights, innovation, and practical execution</highlight> — with a clear focus on building future-proof organizations.

item1.title: Sourcera AI
item1.description: Co-founded the first end-to-end Opportunity-to-Savings (O2S) platform. Sourcera AI connects ERPs, Spend Cubes, and S2C platforms into a single source of truth — using AI to turn fragmented procurement data into optimized tenders and measurable savings within days, not months.

item2.title: Phoenix Group
item2.role: Head of IT & Professional Services in Procurement (Interim)
item2.description: Interim role reporting to the CPO. Led IT and Professional Services in Procurement with a spend volume exceeding EUR 500M. April 2024 – March 2025.

item3.title: van Laack & partners
item3.description: Founded a procurement transformation and strategy consulting firm. Built a team of 20 consultants delivering cost-cutting programs and strategic sourcing for leading enterprises — work that ultimately led to the creation of Sourcera AI.

item4.title: Global Immersion Seminar
item4.role: Harvard Business School & Babson College, Boston
item4.description: Intensive executive seminar in Boston exploring entrepreneurship, innovation ecosystems, and global business strategy with sessions at Harvard Business School and Babson College.

item5.title: Accenture Strategy
item5.description: Led Zero-Based Strategy (ZBx) evaluations, procurement transformation roadmaps, and cost-cutting programs for Fortune 500 clients. Designed strategic sourcing initiatives, evaluated BPO deals, and built Switch & transformation business cases across complex global organizations.

item6.title: HHL Leipzig
item6.description: Part-time MBA at HHL Leipzig Graduate School of Management — one of Europe's leading business schools. Focused on strategy, leadership, and entrepreneurship while continuing professional work in procurement consulting.

item7.title: MHP – A Porsche Company
item7.description: Transformational IT project lead in the automotive industry. Led international SAP MM/SRM rollouts, implemented procurement cloud platforms (Ariba, Fieldglass, Coupa), and managed end-to-end S2P process design for OEMs and tier-1 suppliers.

item8.title: REWE Group
item8.description: Managed EUR 350M in beverage procurement spend across 210 suppliers. Built the Spot Buy department from the ground up, establishing processes and team structures for ad-hoc purchasing.

item9.title: Hanyang University Seoul
item9.description: Studied international business strategy and marketing management at one of South Korea's top universities, gaining cross-cultural trade expertise in the Asian market.

item10.title: EUFH Cologne / REWE Group
item10.description: Awarded IHK 'Besten Ehrung' for outstanding achievement.

card1.title: Digital Procurement (S2C & P2P)
card1.description: End-to-end Source-to-Contract and Procure-to-Pay implementation — from strategic sourcing and contract lifecycle management to operational purchasing and invoice automation.
card1.tags: Ariba, Coupa, Ivalua, Jaggaer, Fieldglass, SAP SRM, GEP

card2.title: Procurement Strategy
card2.description: Custom procurement strategies, Zero-Based approaches (ZBx), cost-cutting programs, category management frameworks, and make-vs-buy evaluations for complex global organizations.
card2.tags: Sievo, PerAngusta, Bonsai, SpendHQ, Market Intelligence, TCO Analysis

card3.title: Supply Chain Optimization
card3.description: Process optimization, operational excellence, and sustainable procurement across end-to-end supply chains — from demand planning to supplier performance management.
card3.tags: SAP S/4, R/3, MM, SRM, Kinaxis, Blue Yonder

card4.title: Digital Transformation
card4.description: Roadmap design, tool selection, change management, and S4/HANA migrations. Guiding organizations from legacy ERP landscapes to modern, cloud-based procurement ecosystems.
card4.tags: SAP S4/HANA, ERP Integration, Cloud Migration, Change Management

card5.title: Project & Program Management
card5.description: Multi-million EUR project delivery, international rollouts, and cross-functional program governance — from stakeholder alignment to go-live and beyond.
card5.tags: Wrike, Jira, Confluence, MS Project, Asana, Monday.com, PMO

card6.title: AI & Automation
card6.description: AI-powered procurement automation, intelligent spend classification, autonomous sourcing agents, RPA for transactional processes, and process mining for continuous improvement.
card6.tags: Python, Sourcera AI, Celonis, UiPath, LLMs, GPT, Claude, Anthropic Certified

zeroUp.title:
The Zero-Up
Approach.
zeroUp.subtitle: Our proven methodology that delivers savings from day one — fully funded by us. We only earn when you save.

phase1.title: Discovery Phase
phase1.description: Data-driven opportunity identification. We analyze your processes, org structure, and governance to identify and validate 5+ savings opportunities.

phase2.title: Execution Phase
phase2.description: Tenders launched in Coupa with Sourcera AI. Realize measurable savings to fund transformation while identifying additional opportunities.

phase3.title: Excellence Phase
phase3.description: Define tool landscape and digital roadmap. Streamline data quality, execute process and organizational improvements for sustainable performance.

zeroUp.poweredBy: Powered by van Laack & partners + Sourcera AI

project4.title: Global Coupa Roll-Out

project5.title: ZBx Digital Transformation

project6.title: Best-of-Breed Procurement Tools

testimonial2.quote: Excellent consulting with a strong strategic understanding of modern procurement processes. The strategy was implemented quickly and seamlessly, significantly contributing to increased efficiency and improved decision making. Highly recommended.

trust.quote: I firmly believe that it is the difficult times that show us what we are truly capable of. Together, we find the right path.
trust.title: Beyond Business
trust.paragraph1: In my consulting work, I repeatedly experience how important trust and interpersonal connections are. Often conversations in challenging projects transcend pure business frameworks, becoming personal and sometimes deeply meaningful.
trust.paragraph2: I believe in honesty, respect, and integrity above all else. My approach is pragmatic — straightforward solutions without unnecessary overhead, getting to the point. I'm the kind of person who solves problems for clients rather than creating new ones. That mindset is at the core of everything I do.
trust.paragraph3: Listening takes priority — always before analysis. I want to ensure I support clients not just in business matters but also where personal aspects come into play.
trust.phoneAlt: Moritz van Laack on the phone in the office
trust.laughAlt: Moritz van Laack working and laughing

q1.question: What is the Zero-Up Approach?
q1.answer: Our proven 3-phase methodology that delivers savings from day one. We start with a fully funded Discovery Phase (22 days) to identify opportunities, move into Execution (3 months) to realize savings with Sourcera AI, and complete with an Excellence Phase (9 months) to embed a sustainable procurement engine. We only earn when you save.

q2.question: What is Sourcera AI?
q2.answer: Sourcera AI is the first end-to-end Opportunity-to-Savings (O2S) platform. It bridges the gap between Spend Cubes and Source-to-Contract tools, using AI to transform fragmented procurement data into optimized tenders and measurable savings. It delivers 10-20% additional savings, 90% less manual work, and 10x faster execution.

q3.question: What consulting services does van Laack & partners offer?
q3.answer: We provide 360-degree supply chain management and procurement consulting with a team of 20 specialized consultants across Europe. Our services include procurement strategy, digital transformation roadmaps, tool implementations (SAP, Coupa, Ivalua, Ariba), interim management, and change management.

q4.question: What industries do you serve?
q4.answer: We work across pharma, retail, logistics, manufacturing, automotive, chemicals, utilities, and packaging. Our clients include Phoenix Group, BASF, Schaeffler, Mercedes-Benz, Volkswagen, Siemens Energy, Zalando, and many more.

q5.question: What platforms are you certified in?
q5.answer: Coupa (Full Suite), SAP Ariba (Full Suite), SAP Fieldglass (CWF/SOW), Ivalua, and Wescale/WPS4. We also have deep expertise in SAP S/4 HANA, Sievo, SpendHQ, Beneering, and 10+ other procurement platforms.

q6.question: How can we work together?
q6.answer: There are several ways: through a Zero-Up engagement (risk-free, fully funded Discovery Phase), traditional consulting and interim management through van Laack & partners, or by implementing Sourcera AI as a SaaS platform. Contact me to discuss which approach fits your needs.

However, liability in this regard is only possible from the time of knowledge of a specific infringement. Upon becoming aware of such violations, I will remove this content immediately.

cookieConsent.message: We use cookies to analyze site traffic and optimize your experience. You can accept or decline optional analytics cookies.

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.section1Text: The protection of your personal data is important to us. This website uses Vercel Analytics to collect anonymous, aggregated usage data without cookies. If you consent, we also use Google Analytics 4 to gain deeper insights into how our site is used. You can decline analytics cookies at any time.
datenschutz.responsiblePartyText:
Moritz van Laack
Boisseréestraße 4
50674 Cologne
Germany
Email: info@vanlaack-partners.com
datenschutz.responsiblePartyNote: The responsible party is the natural person who alone or jointly with others decides on the purposes and means of processing personal data.
datenschutz.yourRightsText: You have the right at any time to obtain free information about the origin, recipient, and purpose of your stored personal data. You also have the right to request the correction, blocking, or deletion of this data. You can contact us at any time regarding this and other questions on the subject of data protection.
datenschutz.yourRightsText2: Furthermore, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority.
datenschutz.localStorageText: This website uses your browser's localStorage to store your language preference, theme setting (light/dark mode), and cookie consent choice. This data is stored locally in your browser and is not transmitted to us.
datenschutz.serverLogsText: The hosting provider automatically collects and stores information in server log files that your browser transmits. This minimal technical data is temporarily retained for security reasons, not analyzed, and automatically deleted.
datenschutz.section4Text: This website uses Vercel Analytics, a privacy-friendly analytics service that collects anonymous, aggregated data without setting any cookies. Additionally, if you give your consent via the cookie banner, Google Analytics 4 (GA4) is loaded. GA4 sets cookies (such as _ga and _ga_*) to distinguish unique users and analyze site usage. These cookies are only set after you explicitly accept them. You can withdraw your consent at any time by clearing your browser's localStorage. If you decline, no analytics cookies are set and GA4 is not loaded.
datenschutz.section5Title: 5. Your Rights as a Data Subject (GDPR)
datenschutz.section5Intro: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights:
datenschutz.rightAccess: Right of access (Art. 15 GDPR): You have the right to obtain information about your personal data processed by us.
datenschutz.rightRectification: Right to rectification (Art. 16 GDPR): You have the right to request immediate correction of inaccurate personal data or completion of incomplete data stored by us.
datenschutz.rightErasure: Right to erasure (Art. 17 GDPR): You have the right to request the deletion of your personal data stored by us, unless processing is necessary for exercising the right of freedom of expression and information, for compliance with a legal obligation, or for reasons of public interest.
datenschutz.rightRestriction: Right to restriction of processing (Art. 18 GDPR): You have the right to request the restriction of the processing of your personal data.
datenschutz.rightPortability: Right to data portability (Art. 20 GDPR): You have the right to receive your personal data in a structured, commonly used, and machine-readable format, or to request the transfer to another controller.
datenschutz.rightObjection: Right to object (Art. 21 GDPR): You have the right to object at any time to the processing of your personal data.
